  I want to view and manage my bookings

steps.name: Given the user is signed in to EventHub
Authenticate with email and password (expecting success)
Enter email address on sign in form
Enter password on sign in form
Verify EventHub home page is displayed
Verify user is authenticated via nav bar state
When the user navigates to the My Bookings page
Navigate to My Bookings via nav bar
And the user opens Browse Events from the bookings page
